ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course content */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of registration for the course (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "available_for" TEXT /* Target audience for the course (e.g., Auditors, Graded Students) */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., online, in-person, hybrid) */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed to register for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "course_fee" REAL /* Fee for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor is associated with */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the registration */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is registering for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student registering for the course */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the registration (e.g., active, completed, cancelled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the registration (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade for graded students */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Audit status of the registration (e.g., auditing, not auditing) */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration (e.g., individual, bundle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student (e.g., auditor, graded) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Enrollment status of the student (e.g., enrolled, on leave, graduated) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_bundles" (
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course bundle */,
  "bundle_title" TEXT /* Title of the bundle */,
  "course_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of courses included in the bundle */,
  "bundle_price" REAL /* Total price for the bundle */,
  "available_for" TEXT /* Target audience for the bundle (e.g., Auditors, Graded Students) */,
  "bundle_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the bundle */,
  "bundle_type" TEXT /* Type of the bundle (e.g., thematic, skill-based) */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage for the bundle */,
  "bundle_status" TEXT /* Status of the bundle (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_id")
)
